message:
feat(core,storage): add agent detection module and path traversal prevention

Core crate:
- Add agent_detect module with InstalledAgentDetectionReport,
  AgentDetectOptions, and detect_installed_agents() for discovering
  coding agents (claude-code, codex-cli, gemini-cli) on the system
- Re-export agent detection types from crate root
- Add tempfile dev-dependency for testing
- New tests: agent_detect_feature_not_enabled_by_default,
  no_tokio_in_core_dependencies (enforcing dependency policy)

Storage crate — path traversal prevention:
- Add validate_archive_component() rejecting empty, ".", "..",
  path separators, and NUL bytes in agent names and recipients
- Add validate_repo_relative_path() rejecting backslashes, NUL,
  ".git" references, ".." components, and absolute paths
- Apply validation to write_agent_profile(), message_paths(),
  write_message_bundle() extra_paths, list_agent_inbox/outbox(),
  read_agent_profile(), and commit_paths()
- Add WriteOp::MailMessage.extra_paths field for multi-file commits
- New tests: path traversal rejection for agent profiles, message
  bundles, extra paths, and inbox listing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -25,6 +25,7 @@ optional = true
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 criterion.workspace = true
+tempfile.workspace = true
 
 [[bench]]
 name = "toon_bench"
